what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-11 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches; it stores YAML frontmatter describing the asset's id, address, blob reference, MIME type, source, author session, creation time, and links, and a short body line identifying it as source design ground-truth.
observations: body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-11.jpg'
standouts: Recorded image dimensions are 0 despite being an image/jpeg
Uses a blob:// URI for content addressing
Belongs to the design-source channel as a recent-pitches asset
No outgoing links or relationships are recorded
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record and may indicate missing extraction
No alt text, caption, or content description is provided
No file size or cryptographic checksum beyond the blob id
links array is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A ledger stub for a design-source pitch JPEG that records blob provenance and authorship but leaves dimensions and relationships unset.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-11.jpg contain?
Is the blob reference resolvable and accessible?
Why does the record have no links to related pitches, sessions, or concepts?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file states it is a SOURCE design ground-truth record, and it indeed functions as a metadata record for a design-source image asset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a specific recent design pitch image as a discoverable, addressable source artifact with authorship and creation provenance.
novelty: The use of both an image://design-source URI and a blob://b2 reference for a pitch asset, combined with zero recorded dimensions, is distinctive.
contribution: It contributes a stable, named metadata record that links a pitch image to its blob and authoring session, supporting retrieval and provenance without asserting priority over other records.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for the JPEG image recent-pitches/p-11 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:35c4e03f8c6646352f29836625f1d47c, with zero recorded dimensions, no links, and a body line labeling it as source design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog a recent design pitch image as a retrievable source artifact with provenance, channel addressability, and blob-level content identity.
